name: Workato
positioning: Enterprise iPaaS for business and IT automation
strengths: Mature integrations; Governance & RBAC; Large partner ecosystem
weaknesses: High price; IT-centric implementation; Limited human-in-the-loop UX

name: Tray.io
strengths: Flexible builder; Data processing at scale; Good API coverage
weaknesses: Steep learning curve; Requires specialists; Approval flows are bolt-on

name: Make (Integromat)
strengths: Affordable; Fast prototyping; Large template library
weaknesses: Brittle workflows; Limited compliance; Weak auditing

name: ServiceNow Flow Designer
strengths: Deep ITSM integration; Governance controls; Existing enterprise footprint
weaknesses: Siloed to ServiceNow; Slow to deploy cross-stack; Poor business user UX

name: Process Street
strengths: Simple checklists; Easy adoption; Good docs
weaknesses: Limited automation; Minimal integrations; No AI routing
